name: KLETKA
description:
You were an ordinary worker. You worked at the factory, waited for the end of samosbor behind the hermetic doors, and then went back to work —the ordinary life of a Gigakhrushchevka resident. And God knows what made you steal an extra can of food concentrate right before the Liquidators arrived with a check-up.

It wasn't much, really, but the CPGKH (Communist Party of Gigakhrushchevka) was inflexible. You got jailed. And now you are condemned to an endless descent on Kletka - an eternally hungry elevator whose path lies only down.

———

IM OBSESSED WITH THIS GAME I HAD TO MAKE A BOT REAL QUICK!!! It's still WIP, I'll be adding details to the lorebook (the Kletka itself is 70% finished, it's not much to put in there), so I'd APPRECIATE some tips n comments, wink wink

Tags: Kletka, Klet, Gigastructure, Gigakhrushevka, Gigakhrush, Self-assembly, Samosbor, Клеть, Гигахрущевка, Гигахрущ, Самосбор
